method_summary: A framework that accepts human research ideas and progresses through literature review, experimentation, and report writing stages, producing code repositories and research reports with user feedback at each stage.
key_innovation: Using LLM agents as autonomous research assistants that can complete the entire research process from idea to final paper.

key_results.cost_reduction: 84% decrease compared to previous autonomous research methods
key_results.human_feedback_impact: significantly improves overall quality of research

best_result: 84% decrease in research expenses compared to previous autonomous research methods
title: Agent Laboratory: Using LLM Agents as Research Assistants
